issues.issue: Business logic is hardcoded and lacks transactional integrity for complex payroll calculations.
issues.fix: Move calculation logic to a service layer or utility function to ensure atomicity and testability.

issues.issue: Status field is a raw string instead of an Enum, risking data inconsistency.
issues.fix: Import the status Enum from the model and use it in the schema.
Implement a PUT/PATCH endpoint for updating settlement details before approval.

issues.issue: Settlement number generation is prone to race conditions.
issues.fix: Use a database-level sequence or a locking mechanism when generating the settlement number.

improvement_hints_for_agent: Always define Enums in the model layer and reuse them in schemas to ensure type safety.
Avoid performing business logic directly in the route handler; delegate to a service layer.
Ensure that all CRUD operations (Update/Delete) are implemented if the schema provides the corresponding DTOs.
